elections.note: NEWSBANK RECOVERY (2026-07-10). Fills the dossier's documented null: docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 1 exhausted all three machine-research routes (press release archive did not exist yet in 2012, zero Wayback captures of eresults.saccounty.net during the primary window, no Sacramento Bee article found via Wayback CDX) and left this row null. A subsequent NewsBank archive pass located the number directly: Sacramento Bee, June 6, 2012 edition (docref news/158D11D2DFBCFC18), '150,286 ... 23 percent' (turnout framing; the article's own dateline is the morning after election night). Confidence secondary (newspaper report, not an official release or archived results page). Certified final = Total Voters 232,743 (CA SoS SoV, embedded in the complete 2012-primary SOV PDF's Voter Participation Statistics by County table; no standalone participation-stats PDF exists for this election). Arithmetic: 150,286/232,743 = 64.57%. Pre-epollbook (adopted 2018-06); ASV never adopted. NewsBank requires an authenticated SFPL ezproxy session (FLAG for manual operator: the cited URL cannot be fetched by curl/machine check, same as every other NewsBank citation in this project; verify by hand via the SFPL portal). PROVENANCE FLAG: this figure was relayed via the batch-2 task brief citing docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/newsbank-recovery.md; that file as committed in this worktree shows an earlier NewsBank pass blocked at NEEDS_LOGIN before reaching any Sacramento target, so this exact number/quote was not independently re-derived from a cached artifact in this repo by this agent -- flagged for human spot-check against the original NewsBank scan.

PLATEAU metric (final election-night report, not the 8 p.m. first tranche). Sacramento County VRE posts a fixed-width Hart 'SUMMARY REPORT' on eresults.saccounty.net. The archived capture embeds the SEMI-OFFICIAL report, Run Date 11/07/12, Run Time 12:49 AM (just after midnight on election night), with PRECINCTS COUNTED 1,106 of 1,106 (100%) and BALLOTS CAST - TOTAL 328,516 (REGISTERED VOTERS - TOTAL 698,899, exactly matching the SoS registration figure). This just-after-midnight all-precincts-in report is the election-night final; it still displayed unchanged in the Wayback capture taken 11/08 ~8:53 PM PT, i.e. it held flat through the next day before the multi-day canvass resumed. 328,516 / 522,045 certified = 62.93%. Denominator = CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 522,045 (Precinct 216,021 + Vote-By-Mail 306,024). Pre-epollbook (Sacramento adopted Voter's Choice Act vote centers + e-pollbooks at the June 2018 primary). ASV never adopted. Snapshot used: web.archive.org 20121109045323if_ of www.eresults.saccounty.net, embedded report Run Date 11/07/12 12:49 AM. VERIFIABILITY NOTE (2026-07-02): Wayback replay currently 302-aliases the 20121109045323 capture (all modifiers, both URL forms) to the 2013-02-15 capture holding the Nov 30 FINAL report, which is why automated fetches see the FINAL instead of the 12:49 AM semi-official report. CDX confirms 20121109045323 is a distinct 10,563-byte snapshot (digest CYR7CXIU2ILIYBWWIIWKZITRPPCVFYRU) differing from the FINAL capture (10,647 bytes), consistent with the reading above. Re-check via the Wayback UI in a browser.

CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('FENU'-coded row), Sacramento County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 122,053, Last Report stamp 'Jun 4 12:11 a.m.' (First Report 'Jun 3 8:09 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20140606205510 (2014-06-06 20:55:10 UTC). SINGLE CAPTURE at 2014-06-06 20:55:10 UTC carries this value. The next available capture (2014-06-07 07:58:13 UTC) jumps to 140,521 (Last Report 'Jun 6 2:08 p.m.'), confirming 122,053 was election night's last state before the canvass moved (non-circular bracket leg per RUNBOOK 8). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 203,850 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2014-primary/pdf/03-voter-particpiation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 122,053/203,850 = 59.87%. vs_epollbook=pre, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2014-06-03 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary. NOTE (2026-07-10): the pending-integration dossier (dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 2) independently found a DIFFERENT, weaker-evidence figure for this date -- 140,521 (secondary, comparable=false, a documented CEILING from a June 6 SEMIOFFICIAL report dated 3 days post-election) -- which disagrees with this row's landed 122,053. Per the overlap rule the stronger CONFIRMED/primary landed value (122,053) is retained unchanged; a NewsBank archive pass was separately run for this date and found NO clean election-night count, only turnout-percent framing, so it does not resolve the disagreement either way (per docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/newsbank-recovery.md log).

PLATEAU metric (final election-night report, not the 8 p.m. first tranche). Archived eresults.saccounty.net capture embeds the Unofficial 'SUMMARY REPORT', Run Date 11/05/14, Run Time 12:33 AM (just after midnight on election night), with PRECINCTS COUNTED 1,263 of 1,263 (100%), BALLOTS CAST - TOTAL 195,317, VOTER TURNOUT 28.57%, REGISTERED 683,632 (matches SoS registration). This all-precincts-in just-after-midnight report is the election-night final; it still displayed unchanged in the Wayback capture taken 11/06 ~02:12 AM PT (held ~26 hrs) before the canvass resumed. 195,317 / 330,817 certified = 59.04%. Denominator = CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 330,817 (Precinct 111,628 + VBM 219,189). Pre-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Snapshot used: web.archive.org 20141106101214if_ of www.eresults.saccounty.net, embedded report Run Date 11/05/14 12:33 AM.

NEW ROW (2026-07-10). CEILING, not the plateau metric (RUNBOOK 5.2), and PROVEN still-moving. The eresults.saccounty.net root migrated to https around election day; only two real-content Wayback captures survive near this election, both labeled SEMI-OFFICIAL: 20160611133801 embeds RUN DATE 06/10/16 RUN TIME 02:31 PM (3 days post-election), BALLOTS CAST - TOTAL 230,234 of 715,993 registered (32.16% turnout, checks); 20160620220131 embeds RUN DATE 06/17/16 RUN TIME 01:53 PM (10 days post-election), BALLOTS CAST - TOTAL 297,409 -- a 29% increase over the prior capture, proving the count was still climbing and neither report is a frozen plateau. No election-night (June 7 evening) or next-morning (June 8-9) capture exists anywhere in Wayback for this URL. The registrar's own MediaRoom/Pages/PressReleases.aspx archive (captured 2016-06-17) corroborates: bulletins titled 'Presidential Primary Election Update - Ballot Count Update(s) to be Released on Friday, June 10' (posted June 9) and '...Wednesday, June 15 and Friday, June 17' (posted June 14) show the county was on a scheduled post-election canvass-update cadence, not a live election-night feed, by 2016. Recorded 230,234 (the earliest, closest-to-election available official figure) as a documented CEILING (comparable: false): 230,234 / 340,360 certified = 67.64%. Pre-epollbook (adopted June 2018). ASV never adopted. Source: docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 3.

CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('SF'-coded row), Sacramento County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 328,744, Last Report stamp 'Nov 9 1:52 a.m.' (First Report 'Nov 8 8:07 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20161110185817 (2016-11-10 18:58:17 UTC). SINGLE CAPTURE at 2016-11-10 18:58:17 UTC carries this value. The next available capture (2016-11-14 19:00:27 UTC) jumps to 385,520 (Last Report 'Nov 11 3:02 p.m.'), confirming 328,744 was election night's last state before the canvass moved (non-circular bracket leg per RUNBOOK 8). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 575,711 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2016-general/sov/03-voter-participation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 328,744/575,711 = 57.1%. vs_epollbook=pre, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2016-11-08 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

NEW ROW (2026-07-10). PLATEAU metric, held-flat-then-jumped bracket (RUNBOOK 8). This is the VCA/e-pollbook ROLLOUT election: county-tech record (data/research/county-tech/sacramento-ca.json) gives vote-center + epollbook adopted_year 2018, first_election '2018-06' -- the June 5, 2018 primary was the FIRST VCA/e-pollbook election, so this row is POST, the earliest post-adoption point in the primaries series. eresults.saccounty.net has no captures for this election (only pre-election subresource crawls Jun 3-4 and a single certified-FINAL capture Jul 9); the numerator instead comes from the sacresults.e-cers.com VCA-era results app. Capture 20180607104634 (crawled Thu Jun 7 10:46 AM) is titled 'Unofficial 2018 Primary Election June 5, 2018', 100.0% precincts reported, and carries a hidden field id=hidVoterTurnout value=124609 (the actual ballots-cast count embedded in the static page, not AJAX-only) plus 'Results Last Updated 6/6/2018 2:25:56 PM' (Wednesday afternoon after the Tuesday election, canvass not yet resumed). A later capture (20180609235727, Sat Jun 9) shows hidVoterTurnout=154,435, a materially higher number, proving a new report superseded the Jun 6 figure between Jun 7 and Jun 9. A third capture (20180708170109, Jul 8) shows hidVoterTurnout=310,881, exactly the certified final, confirming the field is trustworthy. 124,609 / 310,881 certified = 40.08% (consistent in magnitude with the November 2018 general's post-adoption election-night share of 35.52% for the same county). Denominator = CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 310,881 (Precinct 18,104 + VBM 292,777); independently cross-checked against the eresults.saccounty.net Jul 9 FINAL capture, which shows the identical 310,881 (mislabeled 'Registered Voters: 310,881 of 740,537', the same RUNBOOK 7.5 mislabel pattern documented for 2018). ASV never adopted. Source: docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 4.

PLATEAU metric (final election-night report). First Voter's Choice Act / vote-center + e-pollbook general for Sacramento. The eresults.saccounty.net page now embeds an 'ElectionSummaryReportRPT'; the archived capture embeds the report stamped 11/7/2018 1:50:09 AM with Total Times Cast (ballots) 185,623 of 764,998 registered. Per the page's own published schedule the final unofficial election-night report posts by ~2 AM and the first interim canvass report posts ~4 PM the Friday after; the Wayback capture taken 11/07 ~3:44 PM PT still showed the 1:50 AM report, confirming 185,623 held flat through the next day (Wed) before the Friday canvass. 185,623 / 522,652 certified = 35.52%. The sharp drop from the 2014 pre-VCA midterm (59.04%) reflects the 2018 shift to the all-mail VCA model (most ballots arrive as mail, much of it counted after election night), which coincides with e-pollbook adoption. Denominator = CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 522,652 (Precinct 30,279 + VBM 492,373). ASV never adopted. Snapshot used: web.archive.org 20181107234429if_ of eresults.saccounty.net, embedded report 11/7/2018 1:50:09 AM. NB: the county summary page mislabels the ballots-cast figure with a 'Registered Voters:' prefix (185,623 of 764,998); per-contest Times Cast rows on the same page confirm 185,623 is ballots cast.

FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 107,601 recurs across 4 captures, 2022-06-08 09:42:59 UTC through 2022-06-09 03:50:46 UTC, before the next available capture (2022-06-13 05:15:10 UTC) jumps to 173,818 (Last Report 'Jun 10 3:24 p.m.'), marking the canvass resuming. NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 336,014 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2022-primary/sov/03-voter-participation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 107,601/336,014 = 32.02%. vs_epollbook=post, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2022-06-07 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary. CORROBORATION (2026-07-10): independently confirmed via eresults.saccounty.net's own ElectionSummaryReportRPT, internal page-generation stamp 6/8/2022 12:08:32 AM, label 'Sacramento County 2022 June Primary Election June 7, 2022 SEMI-FINAL Voters Cast: 107,601 of 864,181 (12.45%)'; held flat across two same-day captures (10:23 AM and 2:13 PM PT, identical digest) then superseded 14 days later. Equal evidence class (both CONFIRMED/primary bracketed reads); source unchanged. See docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 5.

PLATEAU metric (final election-night report). The archived eresults.saccounty.net capture embeds the ElectionSummaryReportRPT stamped 11/9/2022 12:00:20 AM (SEMI-FINAL) with Voters Cast 145,015 of 864,814 registered (16.77%). This midnight report is the final election-night report and is verified to PLATEAU: three separate Wayback captures across all of Wed 11/9 (taken 11/9 ~01:11 AM, ~11:07 AM, and ~6:36 PM PT) ALL show the identical 11/9 12:00:20 AM / 145,015 report, i.e. it held flat the entire next day before the first interim canvass report (Friday 11/11). 145,015 / 484,315 certified = 29.94%. The low share reflects the low-turnout 2022 midterm under the all-mail VCA model (heavy election-day/late mail counted during the canvass). Denominator = CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 484,315 (Precinct 28,929 + VBM 455,386). Post-epollbook (VCA vote centers + e-pollbooks since 2018). ASV never adopted. Snapshot used: web.archive.org 20221109091143if_ of eresults.saccounty.net, embedded report 11/9/2022 12:00:20 AM (confirmed flat through 20221110023647).

FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 118,205 recurs across 4 captures, 2024-03-06 14:44:09 UTC through 2024-03-08 15:51:26 UTC, before the next available capture (2024-03-09 19:45:02 UTC) jumps to 180,496 (Last Report 'Mar 8 3:12 p.m.'), marking the canvass resuming. NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 346,502 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2024-primary/sov/03-voter-participation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 118,205/346,502 = 34.11%. vs_epollbook=post, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2024-03-05 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary. CORROBORATION (2026-07-10): independently confirmed via eresults.saccounty.net's own ElectionSummaryReportRPT, internal page-generation stamp 3/5/2024 11:47:42 PM, label 'Sacramento County 2024 Presidential Primary Election March 5, 2024 SEMI-FINAL Voters Cast: 118,205 of 868,750 (13.61%)'; identical digest recurs across seven captures spanning ~3 days before a canvass-resumption jump on March 8. Equal evidence class (both CONFIRMED/primary bracketed reads); source unchanged. See docs/research/pending-integration-2026-07-10/dossier-sacramento-ca-primaries.md Item 6.

PLATEAU metric (final election-night report, not the 8:15 p.m. first tranche). The archived eresults.saccounty.net capture (taken 11/6 ~7:17 AM PT, the morning after) embeds the ElectionSummaryReportRPT stamped 11/6/2024 1:56:14 AM (SEMI-FINAL) with Voters Cast 311,821 of 889,465 registered (35.06%). This ~2 AM report is the final election-night report and held through the morning; the next captured report is the first canvass update stamped 11/8/2024 3:57:33 PM (the Friday after) = 411,809 ballots, confirming the big multi-day jump after the plateau. 311,821 / 668,416 certified = 46.65% (higher than the 2018/2022 midterms because the presidential election front-loads more pre-election mail). Denominator = CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County, Sacramento Total Voters 668,416 (Precinct 73,650 + VBM 594,766). Post-epollbook. ASV never adopted. Snapshot used: web.archive.org 20241106151727if_ of eresults.saccounty.net, embedded report 11/6/2024 1:56:14 AM (canvass-resume confirmed at 20241109022213 = 411,809).

notes: METRIC: election-night % = (Sacramento County VRE's FINAL election-night cumulative report, i.e. the ballots-counted total that plateaus late on election night / just past midnight and HOLDS steady through the next day before the multi-day canvass resumes) / CA SoS certified final ballots (Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, 'Total Voters' = Precinct + Vote-By-Mail). NUMERATOR METHOD: Sacramento's live results page (eresults.saccounty.net; older www.eresults.saccounty.net) embeds the official summary report directly in the page HTML, retrievable from the Wayback 'if_' iframe via curl (WebFetch blocked; headless Chrome was refused on subresources during a Wayback playback outage, but `curl <ts>if_/<url>` returns the full embedded report). 2012/2014 use the fixed-width Hart 'SUMMARY REPORT' (Run Date/Time + 100% precincts + BALLOTS CAST - TOTAL); 2018/2022/2024 use the 'ElectionSummaryReportRPT' (report timestamp + Voters Cast). For each year the embedded report's internal Run Date/Time identifies whether a capture is the election-night plateau, the pre-election zero run, or a days-later canvass run; plateau status was confirmed by checking that the same report still displayed in a later same-day/next-morning capture before the canvass jump. PLATEAUS (run timestamp / ballots / certified / pct): 2012 Run 11/07 12:49 AM = 328,516 / 522,045 = 62.93% (PRIMARY); 2014 Run 11/05 12:33 AM = 195,317 / 330,817 = 59.04% (PRIMARY); 2016 = NULL/none (all three routes exhausted: the morning-after press release carried NO ballot total — only a 'next update Friday Nov 11' schedule; no Nov 8-9 election-night capture on eresults.saccounty.net or sacresults.e-cers.com — the e-cers ballots total is AJAX-only and unarchived until the 11/13 canvass; only a pre-election zero run and a Friday 11/11 canvass run of 385,520 = upper bound); 2018 report 11/7 1:50 AM = 185,623 / 522,652 = 35.52% (PRIMARY); 2022 report 11/9 12:00 AM = 145,015 / 484,315 = 29.94% (PRIMARY, held flat through all of 11/9); 2024 report 11/6 1:56 AM = 311,821 / 668,416 = 46.65% (PRIMARY, canvass resumed 11/8 at 411,809). 2020 GENERAL deliberately EXCLUDED (COVID early-voting outlier). ADOPTION: Sacramento deployed electronic pollbooks together with the Voter's Choice Act all-mail vote-center model starting the June 2018 primary, so 2012/2014/2016 are PRE-epollbook and 2018/2022/2024 are POST; automated signature verification (ASV) was never adopted (vs_asv = 'n-a' for all). INTERPRETATION CAVEAT: the election-night share collapses across the 2018 adoption boundary (PRE: 2012 62.93%, 2014 59.04%; POST: 2018 35.52%, 2022 29.94%, 2024 46.65%), but this is driven primarily by the simultaneous VCA all-mail conversion (the bulk of ballots now arrive as election-day/late mail counted during the multi-week canvass) rather than by e-pollbooks per se; e-pollbook adoption is confounded with the VCA switch because both began in 2018. Like-for-like presidential comparison: 2012 pre 62.93% vs 2024 post 46.65%. Like-for-like midterm: 2014 pre 59.04% vs 2018 post 35.52% / 2022 post 29.94%.
